title: PressProbe Object How to Use
description:
PressProbe Object How to Use

PressProbe Object

How to use

1. Specify the basic information.. (Name, Description, AutoStepID, StepID, AbortSeqOnFail property)

2. Specify the I/O operation of when starting this object. (IOPreprocEnabled, IOPreprocOutputBit, IOPreprocOutputStatus property)

3. Specify the trajectory, speed and acceleration of probing. (ProbeTrajectory, AccelS, SpeedS, SpiralDiam, SpiralPitch, DestRelativeX, DestRelativeY, DestRelativeZ property)

4. Specify the detection type. (ProbeDetectType property)

5. Specify the orientation and force of press. (PressOrient, PressForce property)

6. Specify the firmness. (PressFirmnessF property)

7. Specify the end condition about force. (ForceCheckEnabled, ProbeDetectThresh property)

8. Specify the end condition about position. (PosCheckEnabled, PlaneNumber, PlaneEndCond, PlaneRelativeOrg, PlaneRelativeX, PlaneRelativeY, PlaneRelativeZ, PlaneRelativeOrient, PlaneAxes, PlaneRelativeRobotLocal property)

9. Specify the combination of end condition. (EndCheckOperator property)

10. Specify whether to connect the force control of this object and next force guide object. (CFEnabled property)

11. Adjust parameter by cut and try. Mainly adjust the PressForce, PressStiffnessGainF, AccelS, SpeedS, SpiralDiam, SpiralPitch, ProbeDetectThresh, PlaneRelativeX, PlaneRelativeY, PlaneRelativeZ property.
